g.text: Generate Keypair(session, :credential_own, keyspec, keyname, allowed_credentials, callback)
Verify session user has access to Keypair ACL
Encrypt random-password with Keypair ACL's public key
Store the keypairID->enc[password] into Keypair ACL extension field
Activate Keypair ACL signing private key
Construct granted-credential envelope with allow_credential's ID
Register allowed_credential ID -> signed(granted-credential envelope) into subject keypair structure
Generate Keypair(session, {:split_auth_token, required}, keyspec, keyname, custodians (list), custodian_callback)
Verify session user has access to Keypair ACL
Encrypt password split share envelope with custodian's password
Return encrypted split share envelope to custodian for safe keeping
Generate Keypair(session, {:split_key, required}, keyspec, keyname, custodians (list), custodian_callback)
Verify session user has access to Keypair ACL
Encrypt split key share envelope with custodian's password
Return encrypted split key share envelope to custodian for safe keeping
[Split Password Key Protection (Usually for sub issuer keypair inside HSM and not for daily operation]
[Split Private Key Protection (Software Only. Usually for sub issuer keypair not for daily operation)]
